sourcesContent:
// ── Workflow nodes for the hero live canvas
export const WF_NODES = [
  { id: 'n0',  x: 0,    y: 300, emoji: '⚡', title: 'Chat Trigger',         sub: 'Webhook',           bg: 'rgb(18,54,31)',   border: 'rgb(36,143,75)',   color: 'rgb(51,204,107)' },
  { id: 'n1',  x: 200,  y: 300, emoji: '🤖', title: 'Information Extractor',sub: 'OpenAI GPT-4.1',    bg: 'rgb(41,24,57)',   border: 'rgb(115,57,172)',  color: 'rgb(166,112,219)' },
  { id: 'n2',  x: 420,  y: 300, emoji: '🔧', title: 'MadKudu Brief',        sub: 'Account Research',  bg: 'rgb(54,37,18)',   border: 'rgb(163,106,41)',  color: 'rgb(221,146,60)' },
  { id: 'n3',  x: 660,  y: 300, emoji: '🤖', title: 'Generate Outreach',    sub: 'AI Agent + MCP',    bg: 'rgb(41,24,57)',   border: 'rgb(115,57,172)',  color: 'rgb(166,112,219)' },
  { id: 'n4',  x: 900,  y: 300, emoji: '🌐', title: 'Check Existing',       sub: 'Outreach API',      bg: 'rgb(21,40,50)',   border: 'rgb(51,119,153)',  color: 'rgb(71,163,209)' },
  { id: 'n5',  x: 900,  y: 480, emoji: '📝', title: 'Set Mailbox & Seq',    sub: 'Config',            bg: 'rgb(36,36,36)',   border: 'rgb(77,77,77)',    color: 'rgb(140,140,140)' },
  { id: 'n6',  x: 900,  y: 620, emoji: '🔀', title: 'Contact Exists?',      sub: 'If / Router',       bg: 'rgb(54,45,18)',   border: 'rgb(163,133,41)',  color: 'rgb(221,180,60)' },
  { id: 'n7',  x: 720,  y: 720, emoji: '🌐', title: 'Update Prospect',      sub: 'Outreach PATCH',    bg: 'rgb(21,40,50)',   border: 'rgb(51,119,153)',  color: 'rgb(71,163,209)' },
  { id: 'n8',  x: 1100, y: 720, emoji: '🌐', title: 'Create Prospect',      sub: 'Outreach POST',     bg: 'rgb(21,40,50)',   border: 'rgb(51,119,153)',  color: 'rgb(71,163,209)' },
  { id: 'n9',  x: 720,  y: 860, emoji: '📝', title: 'Set Contact ID',       sub: 'Extract',           bg: 'rgb(36,36,36)',   border: 'rgb(77,77,77)',    color: 'rgb(140,140,140)' },
  { id: 'n10', x: 1100, y: 860, emoji: '📝', title: 'Set Contact ID',       sub: 'Extract',           bg: 'rgb(36,36,36)',   border: 'rgb(77,77,77)',    color: 'rgb(140,140,140)' },
  { id: 'n11', x: 900,  y: 960, emoji: '🔗', title: 'Merge IDs',            sub: 'Combine Paths',     bg: 'rgb(25,46,46)',   border: 'rgb(54,125,125)',  color: 'rgb(64,191,191)' },
  { id: 'n12', x: 900,  y:1100, emoji: '🌐', title: 'Add to Sequence',      sub: 'Outreach Batch',    bg: 'rgb(21,40,50)',   border: 'rgb(51,119,153)',  color: 'rgb(71,163,209)' },
  { id: 'n13', x: 900,  y:1240, emoji: '⏳', title: 'Wait 30s',             sub: 'Polling',           bg: 'rgb(50,25,21)',   border: 'rgb(153,65,51)',   color: 'rgb(209,90,71)' },
  { id: 'n14', x: 900,  y:1380, emoji: '🌐', title: 'Get Confirmation',     sub: 'Outreach API',      bg: 'rgb(21,40,50)',   border: 'rgb(51,119,153)',  color: 'rgb(71,163,209)' },
  { id: 'n15', x: 900,  y:1500, emoji: '🌐', title: 'Verify Status',        sub: 'Outreach API',      bg: 'rgb(21,40,50)',   border: 'rgb(51,119,153)',  color: 'rgb(71,163,209)' },
  { id: 'n16', x: 900,  y:1620, emoji: '🔀', title: 'Finished?',            sub: 'Status Check',      bg: 'rgb(54,45,18)',   border: 'rgb(163,133,41)',  color: 'rgb(221,180,60)' },
  { id: 'n17', x: 720,  y:1740, emoji: '✅', title: 'Done ✓',               sub: 'Complete',          bg: 'rgb(18,54,31)',   border: 'rgb(41,163,86)',   color: 'rgb(60,221,119)' },
];

export const WF_EDGES = [
  ['n0','n1'],['n1','n2'],['n2','n3'],['n3','n4'],
  ['n4','n5'],['n5','n6'],
  ['n6','n7'],['n6','n8'],

// ── Platforms ticker
export const PLATFORMS = [
  'Microsoft Teams','Outlook','QuickBooks','Xero','Zoho','ClickUp','n8n',
  'OpenAI','Slack','Google Sheets','WhatsApp','HubSpot','Salesforce',
  'Shopify','Stripe','Airtable','Notion','Supabase','Twilio','Telegram',

];

// ── Workflow cards
export const WORKFLOW_CARDS = [
  {
    category: 'AI & Productivity', catColor: '#a78bfa', nodes: 11,
    title: 'AI Meeting Minutes Processor',
    desc: 'Automatically processes meeting recordings and transcripts from Google Drive, extracts action items...',
    flow: ['Google Drive','AI Extract','Validate','HTML Email'],

  },
  {

    result: 'Zero-touch onboarding',
  },
  {

    title: 'Voice-Powered Warehouse Inventory Counter',
    desc: 'Hands-free inventory cycle counting via Telegram voice messages. Warehouse operators speak locatio...',
    flow: ['Telegram Voice','Transcribe','AI Parse','Validate +2'],
    tags: ['Telegram','OpenAI GPT-4','Google Sheets'], extraTags: 1,
    result: '50% faster cycle counts',
  },
  {
    category: 'Sales & AI', catColor: '#fb923c', nodes: 20,
    title: 'AI-Powered Sales Outreach Generator',
